message:
feat(test): parallelize protocol tests for 3x speedup (bd-dgp)

Add t.Parallel() to all 45 top-level test functions in cmd/bd/protocol.
Each test already creates a fully isolated workspace (unique Dolt prefix,
temp dir, git repo) so parallelization is safe. Reduces test time from
~135s to ~42s on the same machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
